meta.purpose: Candidate events discovered from websites, social pages, ticketing platforms, emails, and poster OCR. These are not public calendar events until reviewed and merged into events.json.
meta.reviewRule: Never auto-publish social or OCR candidates without human review.

evidence.pageTitle: Moreška Korčula - Sword Dance Tickets | Moreška by HGD Sveta Cecilija
evidence.textSnippet: Moreška Korčula - Sword Dance Tickets | Moreška by HGD Sveta Cecilija Sveta Cecilija Korčula · est. 1883 Tickets About History Sections Experience Contact HR · EN Buy Tickets HR · EN HGD Sveta Cecilija Korčula · since 1883 Buy Tickets scroll ↓ A Tale of Swords and Music Since 1883, HGD Sveta Cecilija has stood as the guardian of Korčula's most treasured ritual. While the fierce cadence of the Moreška sword dance once echoed across the entire Mediterranean, today it is performed here only, on the island of Korčula, by the sons of Korčula. Iron swords, archaic verse, and seven battles that have not changed in centuries. Come witness it. Discover Our Story → Experience the Battle 2026 Season Pe

desc.en: Korcula's famous sword dance with live wind orchestra. Tickets are listed on the official Moreska website.
desc.hr: Poznati korculanski macevalacki ples uz puhacki orkestar. Ulaznice su navedene na sluzbenoj stranici Moreske.
